title: Kiku's Mask from One Piece
description: This is the Mask from Kiku from the Wano arc out of One piece
body:
To get the Hannya Mask from Kiku you got to name a Pumpkin : **Kikus Mask**

![the mask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d92d962216332d9df78189555b3cc57503cace5.png)


you will need optifne(forge) or CIT Resewn(fabric) to make it work
